title: Smartworks is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Smartworks is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Smartworks, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Thane operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Smartworks:
Smartworks is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Smartworks!
